FinderTestsz!Basic tests for a finder to pass.c

FinderTests.test_failureN)
__name__
__module__
__qualname__
__doc__
abstractmethodr
	metaclassc
LoaderTestsc
A module should load without issue.
        After the loader returns the module should be in sys.modules.
        Attributes to verify:
            * __file__
            * __loader__
            * __name__
            * No __path__
        Nr
LoaderTests.test_modulec
Loading a package should work.
        After the loader returns the module should be in sys.modules.
        Attributes to verify:
            * __name__
            * __file__
            * __package__
            * __path__
            * __loader__
        Nr
LoaderTests.test_packagec
zOA loader should not be dependent on it's parent package being
        imported.Nr
test_lacking_parentL
LoaderTests.test_lacking_parentc
If a module is already in sys.modules and a reload fails
        (e.g. a SyntaxError), the module should be in the state it was before
        the reload began.Nr
test_state_after_failureR
z$LoaderTests.test_state_after_failurec
zVTest ImportError is raised when the loader is asked to load a module
        it can't.Nr
test_unloadableY
LoaderTests.test_unloadableN)
ABCMetar
